summary: P0/P2 Refactor Regression Testing Complete - All tests passed. Frontend AdminDashboard refactor using AdminUsersPage component works correctly. Backend router extraction (health.py, audit.py) works correctly. Fixed bug in routers/dependencies.py get_current_user function (was using wrong field name).

features_tested.admin_login: PASS - Admin login with ashleyalt005@gmail.com works correctly
features_tested.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All 9 sections navigate correctly (Overview, Users, KYC Queue, Accounts, Card Requests, Transfers Queue, Support Tickets, Audit Logs, Settings)
features_tested.header_title_matches_section: PASS - Header updates correctly on section change, no flicker observed
features_tested.users_section_search: PASS - Search by name, email, phone works correctly
features_tested.users_section_filters: PASS - Status, Role, Tax Hold, Notes filters all work
features_tested.users_section_pagination: PASS - Page navigation and users per page selection works
features_tested.user_details_view: PASS - Clicking user row opens details, back button returns to list
features_tested.status_kyc_badges: PASS - ACTIVE/PENDING status badges and KYC approved/not submitted badges render correctly
features_tested.copy_email_phone_buttons: PASS - Copy buttons visible in user details view
features_tested.tax_hold_management: PASS - Tax Hold Management section shows CLEAR/BLOCKED status
features_tested.transfers_queue_loads: PASS - Section loads correctly (no restore feature changes as expected)
features_tested.api_db_health: PASS - /api/db-health returns database status with user count

bug_fixed.issue: get_current_user function was searching for user by 'id' field instead of '_id' field
bug_fixed.fix: Updated to search by '_id' field and handle both ObjectId and string formats, matching the pattern in server.py
bug_fixed.impact: Audit logs endpoint was returning 401 'User not found' error

critical_code_review_comments: Refactor P0 (AdminUsersPage) is behavior-preserving - all functionality verified working
Refactor P2 (router extraction) has correct implementation after bug fix
AdminUsersPage receives all necessary props from AdminDashboard
All data-testid attributes preserved for testing
No console errors during frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0/P2 refactor regression testing complete. AdminUsersPage component (extracted from App.js) works correctly for all Users section functionality. Backend routers (health.py, audit.py) work correctly after fix to dependencies.py. P1 Transfer Restore was NOT tested as it was explicitly skipped in the refactor. All 9 sidebar sections navigate and load correctly.
